title: Mnesis Canonical Episode Manifest
description: Schema for episode manifest.json sidecars (SPEC §Episode layout).

episodeIndex.description: 0-based episode index matching the first frame's episode_index.

frameCount.description: Number of frames in the episode data.jsonl.

jsonlSizeBytes.description: Byte size of the data.jsonl file on disk.

videoPath.description: Relative path to the video sidecar, or null if absent.

videoSizeBytes.description: Byte size of the video file (0 if no video).

eventsPath.description: Relative path to the events.jsonl sidecar, or null if absent.

annotationsPath.description: Relative path to the annotations/spans.jsonl sidecar, or null if absent.
